H2: Die-Cut Decal FAQs ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Die-Cut Decals

Precision Cut Vinyl Decals for Business, Personal & Promotional Use

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Design Methods Size Options Material Selection Production Speed Quantity Selection Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Die-Cut Decal Order Process & Design Options

Create custom die-cut decals with our flexible design options. Upload your existing artwork or use our online design tool to build professional decals from scratch. Die-cut decals feature precision edges cut exactly to your design shape, eliminating excess material around your graphics. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

Our streamlined ordering process supports both simple text designs and complex multi-color artwork. Whether you need branded business decals, promotional stickers, or personal graphics, our die-cut process delivers clean, professional results that stand out on any surface.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Die-Cut Decal Order Process & Design Options

Our die-cut decal ordering system guides you through design creation, file upload, and order completion. Choose between designing online or uploading your print-ready artwork files. All orders include digital proof approval before production begins.

Design Process

Design from scratch using our online designer with clipart library and text tools, or upload your existing design files. For uploaded files, we recommend EPS format to ensure the highest quality results. Your design will be precision cut to follow the exact contours of your artwork.

Payment

All die-cut decal orders require payment before production begins. We accept major credit cards including VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover. Check payments are also accepted and must be received before your decals enter production.

Live Order Tracking

Track your die-cut decal order through every production stage with our Live Order Tracking system. You'll receive a unique tracking number via email after order placement, allowing you to monitor progress from design approval through delivery. Access real-time updates by clicking the tracking link in your confirmation email.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Die-Cut Decal Production & Turnaround Times

Our flexible production schedule offers turnaround options from 1 to 5 business days for die-cut decals. Production time begins after file upload completion and proof approval. Choose the timeline that best fits your project needs and budget.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Fast-track your die-cut decal order with our priority one-day turnaround. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day. Emergency same-day rushes may be available in special cases - contact customer service for availability and pricing.

2 Business Days Express Production

Express production provides quick turnaround while maintaining cost efficiency. This option works well when you need die-cut decals quickly but have slightly more flexibility than our priority timeline. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular production option balances speed with value. Standard 3-day production includes free processing and works well for most die-cut decal projects. This timeline provides sufficient production time while keeping your project moving efficiently.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Choose saver production when timeline flexibility allows for cost savings. This extended production window reduces costs while still delivering professional die-cut decals within a reasonable timeframe. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.

Note: Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time. Production begins from the time file upload is complete. If an order requires prepress review or proof approval, production time starts from approval confirmation.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Cut Options for Die-Cut Decals

Die-cut decals feature precision cutting that shapes each decal exactly to your design contours. This cutting method removes all excess material, creating clean edges that follow your artwork perfectly. Understanding die-cut specifications helps you design decals that maximize visual impact.

Die-Cut Process for Decals

Die-cutting means cutting through both the vinyl decal material and the paper backing simultaneously. Think of this process like using a cookie cutter - your die-cut decals are individually shaped to match your design outline with no surrounding material. Each decal separates completely from the backing for easy application.

This cutting method works especially well for logos, text, and complex shapes where you want the decal edge to follow your design precisely. Die-cut decals create a professional appearance because there's no visible border or excess material around your graphics.

Note: Back Slit (Crack and Peel) backing option is available only with Standard and Permanent vinyl material selections. This feature makes individual decal removal easier for applications requiring single-decal placement.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Die-Cut Decal Artwork Requirements

Proper artwork preparation ensures your die-cut decals print with sharp detail and cut accurately. We accept various file formats, with vector files providing the best results for clean edges and scalability. Follow these guidelines for optimal die-cut decal production.

Preferred File Types

Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated Post Script) and PDF files work best for die-cut decals. These vector formats maintain sharp edges at any size and provide precise cutting paths. Maximum file size accepted is 100 MB. Convert all fonts to outlines or curves to ensure proper font rendering.

Additional File Formats

We also accept high-resolution JPG, TIFF, and PNG files for die-cut decal printing. These raster formats work well for photographic elements but may show pixelation when enlarged significantly. Ensure your raster files have sufficient resolution for your intended decal size.

File Setup Tips

Set up your artwork proportionate to your final decal size for best results. Convert all text to outlines to prevent font substitution issues. Include bleed only if necessary for your design. Never flatten or merge layers in PSD files. Clearly indicate cut lines for all die-cut decal products to ensure accurate cutting paths.

Transfer-Cut Guidelines

For die-cut decals requiring transfer tape application, use simple and open fonts with all text at least 1/2" tall. Maintain minimum 1/8" spacing between characters and design elements. Main strokes and line weights should be minimum 1/8" wide. Transfer cut pricing includes 8 standard picks with maximum 40 picks per square foot.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Your Die-Cut Decals

We offer multiple shipping options for die-cut decals to meet various timeline and budget requirements. Shipping time is separate from production time, so factor both into your total delivery timeline. Choose the shipping method that best fits your project deadline.

Shipping Methods

Standard shipping options include UPS Ground, UPS 2nd Day Air, and UPS Next Day Air for domestic orders. Economy shipping provides cost-effective delivery for non-urgent die-cut decal orders. Express shipping options ensure faster delivery when you need decals quickly.

Shipping Time Expectations

Ground shipping typically takes 1-5 business days depending on your location. 2nd Day Air delivers within 2 business days, while Next Day Air provides delivery by the next business day. International shipping options are available with extended delivery times based on destination country and customs processing.

Important Shipping Notes

Economy shipping may take 5-10 business days and includes limited tracking capabilities. This option works well for large die-cut decal orders where cost savings outweigh speed requirements. All shipping methods include tracking information so you can monitor your decal delivery progress. Custom hard hat stickers ship using similar methods if you need additional industrial labeling options.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Die-Cut Decal Installation Guide

Proper installation ensures your die-cut decals adhere smoothly and last longer. Clean surface preparation and careful application technique prevent air bubbles and ensure professional results. Follow these steps for successful die-cut decal installation.

Preparing the Surface

Clean the application surface thoroughly with mild soap and water, then dry completely. Remove any dust, grease, or residue that could prevent proper adhesion. For textured surfaces, ensure the texture isn't too rough for the decal to make full contact. Test adhesion on a small area if you're unsure about surface compatibility.

Applying Die-Cut Decals

Remove the backing paper carefully, starting from one corner. For larger die-cut decals, remove backing gradually while smoothing the decal onto the surface. Use a squeegee or credit card to eliminate air bubbles, working from the center outward. Apply firm, even pressure to ensure complete adhesion.

Removing Transfer Tape

If your die-cut decals include transfer tape, remove it slowly at a 45-degree angle. Pull steadily to avoid lifting the decal edges. If any part of the decal lifts with the transfer tape, press it back down and continue removing the tape more slowly. The decal should remain fully adhered to the surface.

For complex installations or specialty applications, consider our dry erase wall decals which use similar application techniques for larger format installations.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Die-Cut Decals?

Die-cut decals are vinyl graphics cut precisely to the shape of your design, removing all excess material around the edges. Made from durable vinyl material, these decals feature adhesive backing for application to various surfaces including glass, metal, plastic, and painted surfaces. Die-cut decals are commonly used for business branding, product labeling, vehicle graphics, and promotional applications where clean, professional appearance is important.

Order Custom Die-Cut Decals Today

Create professional die-cut decals that showcase your brand, message, or design with precision-cut edges and durable vinyl construction. Our flexible production options and comprehensive design support make it easy to bring your vision to life. Whether you need business decals, promotional stickers, or custom graphics, our die-cut process delivers results that stand out.

Start your die-cut decal project today with our online designer or upload your existing artwork. With production times from 1-5 business days and multiple shipping options, we'll help you get professional decals when you need them. Need complementary products? Check out our crack and peel stickers for easy-to-remove applications or explore our custom holographic vinyl material for eye-catching specialty effects.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Die-Cut Decal FAQs

What exactly is a die-cut decal?

A die-cut decal is a vinyl graphic that's cut precisely to the contour of your design, removing all excess material around the edges. Unlike square or rectangular decals, die-cut decals follow the exact shape of your artwork, creating a clean, professional appearance with no visible border. The cutting process goes through both the vinyl and backing paper, making each decal an individual piece shaped like your design.

What material is used for die-cut decals?

Die-cut decals are made from high-quality vinyl material available in standard and permanent adhesive options. The vinyl is weather-resistant and suitable for both indoor and outdoor applications. Standard material allows for easier removal, while permanent adhesive provides stronger, long-lasting adhesion for applications requiring durability.

Can die-cut decals include multiple colors and complex designs?

Yes, die-cut decals can incorporate multiple colors, fonts, and images in a single design. Our printing process handles complex artwork including photographs, gradients, and detailed graphics. The die-cutting process then shapes the entire printed decal to your design outline, maintaining all color and detail accuracy.

Are die-cut decals waterproof for outdoor use?

Die-cut decals made with our vinyl materials are waterproof and suitable for outdoor applications. The vinyl material resists moisture, UV exposure, and temperature changes, making these decals appropriate for vehicle graphics, window displays, and outdoor signage applications.

What surfaces work best for die-cut decal application?

Die-cut decals adhere well to smooth, clean surfaces including glass, metal, plastic, painted walls, and vehicles. The surface should be free of dust, grease, and texture that would prevent complete contact. Test adhesion on textured surfaces before full application to ensure proper bonding.

How large can die-cut decals be manufactured?

Die-cut decals can be produced in various sizes depending on your design requirements. Large format die-cut decals are possible for vehicle graphics and signage applications. Contact our customer service team to discuss size limitations for your specific design and intended application.
